description_long: This is a compact electric drill with a light gray, textured plastic body and an ergonomic handle designed for comfortable grip. The drill features a visible power cord extending from the rear, indicating it is corded rather than battery-operated. Ventilation slots are present on both sides of the main body to prevent overheating during use. A black trigger button is located on the handle, allowing for easy operation with one hand. The front of the drill is fitted with a standard twist drill bit, and the chuck appears to be keyless for quick bit changes. A brand label is visible on the side, adding a touch of authenticity to the tool.
description: A light gray, corded electric drill with a textured grip, visible trigger, ventilation slots, and a twist drill bit attached.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ergonomic handle, trigger button, ventilation slots, and power cord.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the drill bit, chuck, and the narrow profile of the drill body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brand label, ventilation slots, and the full length of the handle and cord.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the power cord entry point and the back of the handle.
